faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about our kimono rental services at Kyo Kimono Rental
faq.q1: 1. Do I need to book in advance?
faq.a1: Booking in advance is recommended to ensure you have enough kimonos, your preferred size, and time slots, especially during cherry blossom and autumn seasons.
faq.q2: 2. What is included in the rental price?
faq.a2: The price includes the kimono, obi (belt), bag, traditional sandals (zori/geta), tabi socks, and professional dressing support. Some packages also include free hair styling.
faq.q3: 3. How long is the rental duration?
faq.a3: Usually, you can wear the kimono during the day and return to the shop before closing time. If you wish for a longer duration, please contact us in advance.
faq.q4: 4. Can I wear a kimono for photography in Gion old town?
faq.a4: Absolutely. The shop is located in the heart of Gion, so you can easily walk to Yasaka Shrine, Shirakawa River, and many beautiful photo spots.
faq.q5: 5. Are there kimono sizes for tall guests or foreigners?
faq.a5: Yes. We have many different sizes suitable for both Vietnamese and international guests.
faq.q6: 6. Can I rent a kimono if it rains?
faq.a6: Yes, you can. The shop will provide traditional umbrellas so you can walk and take photos comfortably.
faq.q7: 7. Can I book through Instagram or Facebook?
faq.a7: Yes. You can message us directly via Instagram or Facebook, or book in advance to reserve your spot.
faq.q8: 8. What should I wear under the kimono in winter?
faq.a8: Kyo Kimono Rental is located in Gion, Kyoto - the heart of Japan's traditional culture, near famous landmarks like Kiyomizu-dera Temple and Yasaka Shrine. Address: 347-25 Gionmachi Kitagawa, Higashiyama Ward, 3F, Kyoto 605-0073, Japan
faq.q9: 9. Does the shop offer professional photography services?
faq.a9: Yes, we offer professional photography. Please book in advance and inform us of the number of people and duration (1 or 2 hours). Specific prices will be provided via message.
faq.q10: 10. Can I come early or return items late?
faq.a10: The shop has flexible hours from 5:00 AM to 8:00-9:00 PM. However, arriving or returning outside standard hours (9:00 - 17:00) will incur a surcharge of approximately 2,000 JPY. Groups may be eligible for discounts.
faq.q11: 11. How long does the dressing and hairstyling take?
faq.a11:
Preparation times are as follows:
- Basic set: approx. 10 mins
- Premium (Houmongi, Furisode): approx. 20 mins
- Hair styling: 8-15 mins depending on the style.

about.title: Premium Kimono Rental Service in Gion, Kyoto
about.p1: Kyo Kimono Rental is a premier kimono rental shop located in Gion, Kyoto. With over 200 genuine kimonos, we offer a diverse selection from traditional to modern styles - suitable for women, men, and children.
about.p2: Our professional team will help you dress properly, style your hair perfectly, and arrange photography. Whether you're strolling through Kyoto, visiting Kiyomizu-dera, or attending an event, Kyo Kimono Rental is ready to help you create unforgettable moments.
about.p3: At Kyo Kimono Rental, our professional team will assist you with proper kimono dressing, elegant hairstyling, and optional professional photography services. As a trusted kimono rental shop in Kyoto, we help you capture unforgettable moments while exploring famous attractions such as Kiyomizu-dera and the historic streets of Gion.
about.p4: Whether you're sightseeing, taking photos, or attending a special event, our service guarantees a seamless and memorable experience.
about.ctaText: Book your kimono rental in Kyoto today and create unforgettable memories with Kyo Kimono Rental.
about.imageAlt: Kyo Kimono Rental shop interior in Kyoto
about.locationValue: 347-25 Gionmachi Kitagawa, Higashiyama Ward, 3F, Kyoto 605-0073, Japan - Near Kiyomizu-dera Temple, Yasaka Shrine, and Gion walking street.

process.title: How Kimono Rental Works at Kyo Kimono Rental
process.subtitle: Just 4 simple steps for an amazing kimono experience
process.step1Desc: Book via website, Zalo, or phone. Choose a plan and date that works for you.
process.step2Desc: Visit our store and pick your favorite kimono from our collection of 200+ styles.
process.step3Desc: Our professional team helps you dress properly and style your hair in just 30 minutes.
process.step4Desc: Stroll through Kyoto, take photos at popular spots, and create unforgettable memories.
